data.title: Airway Treatment
body: Airway-focused care looks at how you breathe—nasal and oral pathways, sleep-related symptoms, and how they connect to oral structures.

Dr. Clark evaluates your history and exam findings to discuss options that support healthier breathing alongside your dental goals. Replace this copy with your finalized clinical descriptions and imagery from Strapi.

data.title: Complete & Partial Dentures
body: Dentures can replace some or all teeth when implants or bridges aren’t the right fit. We focus on comfort, fit, and natural appearance.
Mock detail page — connect to Strapi for photos, FAQs, and pricing context.

data.title: Dental Bridges
body: Bridges replace missing teeth by anchoring to neighboring teeth or implants—restoring chewing and smile continuity.
Placeholder content for static build.

data.title: Dental Implants
body: Implants replace tooth roots and support crowns, bridges, or dentures with excellent stability.
Planning, healing timelines, and candidacy are discussed in person.

data.title: Dental Prophylaxis
body: Professional cleanings reduce inflammation and help maintain gum health between visits.

data.title: Laser Gum Therapy
body: Laser-assisted periodontal care can reduce pockets and support healing with less invasive techniques in select cases.

data.title: Solea laser assisted restorations without anesthesia
body: The Solea laser supports many restorations with little or no anesthesia—patients often leave without facial numbness.
See also our Technology page for more on Solea.

data.title: Mercury-Free Fillings
body: Since 1985 Dr. Clark discontinued placing amalgam and focuses on biocompatible restorative materials.
Learn more on our Mercury Fillings page.

data.title: Ogram System for Oral Surgery
body: The Ögram System is a specialized extraction approach that uses less force and helps preserve bone when appropriate.

data.title: Orthodontics
body: Orthodontic options are discussed when alignment impacts health, function, or aesthetics.

data.title: Ozone Therapy
body: Medical-grade oxygen/ozone mixtures can help reduce pathogens in select treatments while supporting conservative care.

data.title: PRF Therapy
body: Platelet-rich fibrin uses your own blood to support healing after extractions and other procedures.

data.title: Sleep Apnea Treatment
body: Airway and sleep concerns may overlap with oral appliances and other therapies—evaluation guides next steps.

data.title: Microscopic evaluation of oral flora
body: Microscopic evaluation can help characterize oral flora as part of a personalized hygiene and treatment plan.
